title: goodenia expansa
intro: Goodenia expansa, also known as native violet or purple-flower goodenia, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. Goodenia expansa is believed to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a valuable resource in natural and traditional medicine.
